features: A3 framed Tottenham Hotspur UEFA Europa League Winners 2025 signed shirt reproduction with printed squad autographs.
Commemorates Tottenham Hotspur’s 1–0 win over Manchester United in the 2025 UEFA Europa League Final.
Presented in a premium black brushed effect frame measuring 46cm x 34cm – ready to hang or gift.
Professionally printed reprint featuring printed facsimile signatures of the 2025 Spurs team.
Perfect football memorabilia collectible for Tottenham Hotspur fans and sports enthusiasts.
Eco-friendly UK-made design using sustainable, locally sourced card and paper.
Ideal gift for birthdays, Christmas, Father’s Day, or any Tottenham Hotspur celebration.
Authentic-style Tottenham Hotspur Champions display – printed, not hand-signed.
A3 size framed photo display – 46cm height x 34cm width – high-quality brushed effect finish.
Exclusive 2025 UEFA Europa League Winners Edition – a must-have collectible for every Spurs supporter.
description: Tottenham Hotspur UEFA Europa League Winners 2025 A3 Framed Display Celebrate Tottenham Hotspur’s historic UEFA Europa League victory in 2025 with this beautifully presented A3 framed poster display . Featuring the Spurs 2025 Winners shirt design with printed facsimile autographs from the entire team, this reproduction reprint comes ready to hang in a black brushed effect frame for a premium finish. Champions Edition: Commemorating Tottenham’s 1–0 victory over Manchester United in the UEFA Europa League Final 2025. Authentic Look: Features printed autographs from the full 2025 squad, including star players and coaching staff. Premium Frame: Black brushed effect A3 frame (approx. 46cm x 34cm) – elegant and ready to hang. Eco-Friendly: Professionally printed and designed in the UK using sustainable paper and card. Perfect Gift: Ideal for birthdays, Father’s Day, Christmas, or any Tottenham fan celebration. Note: This is a reproduction print featuring printed facsimile signatures – not hand-signed memorabilia.
